title: Craftable Podzol and Mycelium
description: Craft Podzol and Mycelium in your survival world!
body:
# Craftable Podzol and Mycelium
This datapack will enable you to craft Podzol and Mycelium in your survival world!

Using dirt and leaf litter you will be able to craft Podzol and using Dirt and either red or brown mushroom blocks you will be able to craft Mycelium.

# Recipes

| | | |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Podzol | Mycelium from brown mushroom blocks | Mycelium from red mushroom blocks |
| ![Podzol Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b03877e62b17968b722e82f3d0e49275e33b423a.png) | ![mushroom recipe 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47b21b9da041e3a01cf408b94206bc95da1d8285.png) | ![mushroom recipe 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5decc76b460a847e1264cf881defb5a5ec1a9b5c.png) |
